**What's missing**

**Your actual workflow** (Bullpen's default route table leans software-dev-heavy; if your use case is different, say what kind of tasks you're routing)

**Have you tried customizing `skills/model-routing/SKILL.md` or the `route-gate.sh` environment variables first?** (see [FAQ.md](../../FAQ.md)) Some asks are already solvable without a code change.
